entity.summary: Fantom automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with factory-created trading pairs, liquidity pools, gauge incentives, and option-token reward mechanics.
entity.notes: A current protocol adapter updated in June 2026 queries the FVM Exchange Fantom pair factory, enumerates all trading pairs, reads reserves and gauges, calculates liquidity and incentives, and links the exchange liquidity application. The public site was not independently fetched in this review, so URL status remains live_unverified and confidence is medium.

evidence.title: FVM Exchange liquidity and yield adapter
evidence.notes: Current adapter queries the Fantom pair factory, enumerates exchange pairs, reads pool reserves, gauges, reward rates, option-token incentives, and links the FVM Exchange liquidity application.

evidence.title: FVM Exchange DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FVM Exchange as a Fantom decentralized exchange. Current on-chain adapter evidence controls the active classification.
